params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste. Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, matte ceramic accessories, warm under-cabinet light. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm Japandi interior that balances Scandinavian minimalism and Japanese restraint with warm, earthy materials. Emphasis on low, horizontal furniture lines, layered natural textures (wood, linen, woven rattan), and a restrained palette of warm neutrals to create a cozy, meditative home for a young family. Integrate a small work corner in the living area and a crib in the bedroom while keeping clutter minimal. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
